By next year, we will have opened the second clinic.
This time next month, I will be presenting to the board.
By our third anniversary, we will have hired the whole team.
This time next spring, we will be running both sites at once.
So, Eliane, a year from now, where will the clinic be?
By this time next year, we will have opened the second site and, I hope, broken into a whole new market.
Ambitious. And day to day, what will that look like?
This time next spring, I will be running two teams at once, so I am building the roadmap now.
Good. What is on the horizon that excites you most?
Two things in the pipeline. If the pilot works, it will be a real game changer and a springboard into a new market.
Just be careful not to scale up faster than you can hire.
Agreed. By December, we will have hired eight people, and we will be ramping up the systems first.
That is the right trajectory. A year from now, you will not be pitching an idea. You will be reporting growth.
There is a game changer in the pipeline.
By December, we will have hired the whole team.
The trajectory is clear, and we are ahead of schedule.

Hi Eliane, it is Nathan. I have been looking at your roadmap for next year, and I am impressed. Let me tell you what I see on the horizon. By this time next year, you will have opened the second clinic, and if the numbers hold, you will have broken into the São Paulo market properly. This time next quarter, you will be running two teams at once, so the priority now is the people. Do not scale up faster than you can hire. Here is my one piece of advice. Six months from now, when the investors call, you will not be pitching an idea anymore. You will be reporting real growth. So keep building the foothold you have, stay ahead of schedule where you can, and remember, the trajectory matters more than any single month. This is the year the plan comes together.

Hi team, it is Eliane. I want to share where we are heading, because the road ahead is exciting. By the end of this year, we will have opened the second clinic and we will have hired eight new people. This time next spring, we will be running both sites at the same time, so we need the systems ready now. There are two things in the pipeline that could be real game changers, and if the pilot works, they will give us a springboard into a whole new market. I will not pretend it will be easy. We will be ramping up fast, and some weeks will be an uphill climb. But by our third anniversary, we will have built something that felt impossible on day one. The trajectory is clear. Let us go and meet it.
